summary: Strengthen completion gates for Tier 2/3 and git state enforcement

details.tier_rationale: 복수 운영 문서와 자동 감사 스크립트 변경. 보안/인증/DB/API breaking change 없음.

spec.objective: 직전 전체 검토에서 도출한 남은 개선점인 Tier 2/3 validation/merge evidence enforcement, notify script permission, git dirty completion gate, legacy warning suppression metadata를 반영한다.
success_criteria: Tier 2/3 완료 시 VALIDATION_RESULT 또는 명시적 validation_omission_reason을 검사한다.
git 저장소 모드 완료 시 MERGE_COMPLETED 또는 명시적 merge_omission_reason을 검사한다.
완료 시 작업공간 dirty 상태를 검사하거나 명시적 예외를 요구한다.
Analyst 가이드 유지보수 쓰기 허용 목록에 notify-slack 스크립트를 명시한다.
legacy warning을 구조화된 correction/suppression metadata로 정리한다.

next_action: create task branch and patch completion gate scripts/docs

summary: Wrote Tier 2 report and quality score for completion gate hardening
next_action: append completion event and run final audits

details.validation_omission_reason: Analyst guide-maintenance task verified by local audit scripts; no independent Validator event was requested in this turn.
details.merge_omission_reason: Changes are kept on task/TASK-20260426-056 for user review; no main merge was performed or claimed.
details.git_dirty_allowed_reason: The completed deliverable is the current working tree on task/TASK-20260426-056; user did not request a commit or merge in this turn.
